title: Not equal evaluation does not work
poc: create table t2 (id int, s int);
select t1.id,t1.dp,t3.cnt from t1,(select count(*) as cnt from t2) t3 where t1.id > 1 and t1.dp <> t3.cnt;
select t1.id,t1.dp,t2_cnt from t1 where t1.id > 1 and t1.dp <> t2_cnt;
select t1.id,t1.dp from t1 where t1.id > 1 and t1.dp <> (select count(*) from t2);
key_bug_features: Not equal evaluation in SQL query fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id int, value varchar(10), status boolean);
INSERT INTO t3 VALUES (1, 'active', TRUE), (2, 'inactive', FALSE), (3, 'active', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE t4 (id int, score float, description text);
SELECT t1.id, t1.dp, t4.score FROM t1 JOIN t4 ON t1.dp <> t4.score WHERE t1.id > 1;
